`.help -mod` - Show moderator commands.\:
`.help -mod` - Show moderator commands.
`.backupdata` - Send a zip of the current data files.
`.syncrankroles` or `.syncranks` - Sync ranked Discord roles.
`.mods` - List bot moderators.
`.addmod @user` - Add a bot moderator. Admins, bot owners, and manager IDs only.
`.removemod @user` - Remove a bot moderator. Admins, bot owners, and manager IDs only.
`.help` - Show this command list.\n`.pro:
`.help` - Show this command list.
`.profile [@user]` or `.prof [@user]` - View a profile.
`.cd` - Check practice, daily, ranked, and vote cooldowns.
`.daily` - Earn cash and gold every 24 hours.
`.vote` - Vote on Top.gg and claim 50 cash plus 5 gold.
`.inventory [filters]` or `.inv [filters:
`.inventory [filters]` or `.inv [filters]` - View your cards.
Filters: `-player`, `-team`, `-game`, `-rarity`, `-set`, `-league`, `-role`.
Example: `.inv -game LoL -team T1 -rarity Gold -role mid`
`.progress [filters]` - View collection progress.
`.completion` - View set completion and power bonuses.
`.info [filters]` or `.info <CID>` - List or inspect bot cards.
`.view <inventory #>` - View one inventory card.
`.packs` - View unopened packs.
`.open <pack #|pack id|pack name>` - Open a pack.
`.open -all` - Open your packs one at a time from lowest index.
`.leaderboard` or `.lb` - View users ran:
`.leaderboard` or `.lb` - View users ranked by ELO.
`.ranked` or `.r` - Play a ranked match to earn cash and XP.
`.practice` or `.p` - Earn cash and XP every 10 minutes.
`.team` - View your LoL or Valorant lineup.
`.prediction`, `.predictions`, `.pred`,: `.prediction`, `.predictions`, `.pred`, or `.preds` - View matches and manage your picks.
`.shop` - View packs for sale and buy pa:
`.shop` - View packs for sale and buy packs.
`.auction` - View auctions with filters, bidding, and buy now.
Auction filters include `-progress` / `-needed`.
`.auction -sell <inventory #>` - Auction a card.
`.auction -sellpack <pack #>` - Auction a pack.
`.autosell` - Auction duplicate cards using autosell settings.
`.autosell -settings` - Configure autosell.
`.trade @user` - Start a trade.
